tasks.label: forgevm:native:prepare-output
args:
if not exist "..esources
ative\win-x64" mkdir "..esources
ative\win-x64" & del /q "..esources
ative\win-x64\*.dll" 2>nul & del /q "..esources
ative\win-x64\*.exe" 2>nul & del /q "..esources
ative\win-x64\*.lib" 2>nul & del /q "..esources
ative\win-x64\*.exp" 2>nul

tasks.label: forgevm:native:build-release-msvc
args:
cl /nologo /LD /EHsc /utf-8 /O2 /MT /Fe:..esources
ative\win-x64 orgevm_native.dll cpp orgevm_native.cpp cpp orgevm_memory.cpp cpp orgevm_transform.cpp /link /NOIMPLIB Advapi32.lib Shell32.lib && del /q "..esources
ative\win-x64 orgevm_native.exp" 2>nul & del /q "..esources
ative\win-x64 orgevm_native.lib" 2>nul & del /q *.obj *.pdb 2>nul & del /q cpp\*.obj cpp\*.pdb 2>nul

tasks.label: forgevm:agent:build-release-msvc
args: cl /nologo /EHsc /utf-8 /O2 /MT /Fe:..\resources\native\win-x64\forgevm_agent.exe cpp\forgevm_agent.cpp Advapi32.lib Shell32.lib ole32.lib oleaut32.lib wbemuuid.lib Psapi.lib & del /q *.obj *.pdb 2>nul & del /q cpp\*.obj cpp\*.pdb 2>nul
